rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ROSA A THICK TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Of Motion To Reopen Trust/Probate Case
rulings.Rulings: This tentative ruling is issued by Judge Russell S. Roeca. Before the court is Miguel Eduardo Archila Morales' Motion to Reopen Trust/Probate Case. This motion is DENIED, for the following reasons: The motion is procedurally defective. There is no proof of service or notice of hearing for this motion, or any other indication that a copy of the motion and notice of this hearing have been served on the necessary parties, including the trustee(s). That being said, this case number was not "closed" to further proceedings or filings. Notwithstanding any statutory limitations or standing issues, there is no statutory requirement that a party receive the court's permission to file a new petition in this case number. The court will return to movant the original deposition transcript he lodged with the court in connection with this motion. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise other parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:00 p.m. on the day before the hearing. To appear by Zoom, go to zoom.us and click "Join Meeting." Enter Meeting ID number 1602254765 and passcode 514879. To appear telephonically through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts. Enter Meeting ID number 1602254765# and passcode 514879#. Parties appearing via Zoom should use their full names in the "Your Name" section. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling CourtCall at 1-888-882-6878 and obtaining an appearance access code for the hearing's scheduled date and time in Department 204.
